# tina4js — LLM Context

Sub-3KB reactive JavaScript framework. Signals, web components, routing, API, PWA, WebSocket, debug overlay.
Works standalone or inside tina4-php / tina4-python full-stack apps.
Target: admin panels, dashboards, CRUD apps, monolithic server-rendered apps.
NOT designed as a React/Vue replacement for large SPA teams.

Install: `npm install tina4js`
Version: 1.0.13
Exports: `.` `./core` `./router` `./api` `./pwa` `./ws` `./debug`

---

## Signals (src/core/signal.ts)

```ts
import { signal, computed, effect, batch, isSignal } from 'tina4js';

const count = signal(0);          // reactive value
const count = signal(0, 'label'); // with debug label
count.value;                      // read (tracks dependencies)
count.value = 5;                  // write (notifies subscribers)
count.peek();                     // read WITHOUT tracking

const doubled = computed(() => count.value * 2); // read-only derived signal

const stop = effect(() => {
  console.log(count.value);       // runs immediately + on each change
});
stop();                           // dispose effect

batch(() => {
  a.value = 1;
  b.value = 2;                    // subscribers notified once, not twice
});
```

**Error isolation:** if one effect throws, sibling effects still run. First error re-thrown after all subscribers notified.

---

## HTML Templates (src/core/html.ts)

```ts
import { html } from 'tina4js';

// Returns a DocumentFragment. Append to DOM.
const frag = html`<h1>Hello, ${name}!</h1>`;

// Signal interpolation → reactive text node (updates in place)
const name = signal('World');
html`<p>${name}</p>`;

// Reactive block → re-renders when deps change
html`<div>${() => items.value.map(i => html`<li>${i}</li>`)}</div>`;

// Array of fragments
html`<ul>${items.map(i => html`<li>${i}</li>`)}</ul>`;
```

### Attribute Binding Syntax

| Syntax | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `${value}` | Escaped text node (XSS-safe) |
| `${signal}` | Reactive text node |
| `${() => expr}` | Reactive block |
| `.innerHTML=${val}` | DOM property — raw HTML / SVG injection |
| `.value=${signal}` | Any DOM property, reactive |
| `?disabled=${signal}` | Boolean attribute — added/removed reactively |
| `@click=${fn}` | Event listener |

**CRITICAL:** `${svgString}` in content position is ALWAYS escaped as text.
To inject raw HTML or SVG: `<div .innerHTML=${svgString}></div>`

---

## Router (src/router/router.ts)

```ts
import { route, navigate, router } from 'tina4js';

// Pattern is ALWAYS the first argument
route('/', () => html`<h1>Home</h1>`);
route('/users/{id}', ({ id }) => html`<p>User ${id}</p>`);
route('*', () => html`<h1>404</h1>`);

// With guard (return false to block, return string to redirect)
route('/admin', {
  guard: () => isLoggedIn.value || '/login',
  handler: () => html`<admin-panel></admin-panel>`,
});

// Async routes
route('/data', async () => {
  const data = await api.get('/data');
  return html`<pre>${JSON.stringify(data)}</pre>`;
});

router.start({ target: '#app', mode: 'history' }); // or 'hash'

navigate('/dashboard');
navigate('/login', { replace: true }); // no back-button entry

router.on('change', ({ path, params, durationMs }) => { ... });
```

---

## API Client (src/api/fetch.ts)

```ts
import { api } from 'tina4js';

// Configure once at startup
api.configure({
  baseUrl: 'https://api.example.com',
  auth: true,                      // sends Authorization: Bearer <token>
  tokenKey: 'tina4_token',        // localStorage key for the JWT
  headers: { 'X-App': 'my-app' }, // default headers on every request
});

// Methods — options is ALWAYS { params, headers }, NOT path template params
await api.get('/users');
await api.get('/users', { params: { page: 2, limit: 20 } });
await api.get('/users', { headers: { 'X-Custom': 'val' } });
await api.post('/users', { name: 'Alice' });
await api.put('/users/1', { name: 'Bob' });
await api.patch('/users/1', { name: 'Carol' });
await api.delete('/users/1');

// Interceptors
api.intercept('request', (config) => {
  config.headers['X-Trace'] = crypto.randomUUID();
});
api.intercept('response', (res) => {
  if (res.status === 401) navigate('/login');
});
```

On non-2xx responses, the `ApiResponse` object is **thrown** (not returned).
Catch it: `try { await api.get(...) } catch (e) { e.status, e.data }`

Token rotation: if backend responds with `FreshToken` header, it's stored automatically.
formToken is injected into POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE bodies when `auth: true` (tina4-php/python CSRF).

---

## WebSocket (src/ws/ws.ts)

```ts
import { ws } from 'tina4js';

const socket = ws.connect('wss://example.com/ws', {
  reconnect: true,          // default: true
  reconnectDelay: 1000,     // ms (default: 1000)
  reconnectMaxDelay: 30000, // exponential backoff cap (default: 30000)
  reconnectAttempts: 10,    // Infinity by default
  protocols: ['json'],      // optional sub-protocols
});

// Reactive signals
socket.status.value;       // 'connecting' | 'open' | 'closed' | 'reconnecting'
socket.connected.value;    // boolean
socket.lastMessage.value;  // last parsed message (JSON auto-parsed)
socket.error.value;        // last Error event or null
socket.reconnectCount.value;

socket.send({ type: 'ping' }); // objects auto-JSON.stringify'd

// Event handlers
const unsub = socket.on('message', (data) => console.log(data));
socket.on('open', () => console.log('connected'));
socket.on('close', (code, reason) => { ... });
socket.on('error', (event) => { ... });
unsub(); // unsubscribe

// Pipe messages into a signal via reducer
const messages = signal([]);
socket.pipe(messages, (msg, current) => [...current, msg]);

socket.close(); // intentional close — stops reconnect
```

---

## Web Components (src/core/component.ts)

```ts
import { Tina4Element, html, signal } from 'tina4js';

class MyCounter extends Tina4Element {
  static props = { label: String };         // declares reactive props
  static styles = `:host { display: block; }`; // scoped CSS (Shadow DOM)
  static shadow = true;                     // false = light DOM

  count = signal(0);                        // internal reactive state

  render() {
    return html`
      <span>${this.prop('label')}: ${this.count}</span>
      <button @click=${() => this.count.value++}>+</button>
    `;
  }

  onMount() { /* called after first render */ }
  onUnmount() { /* called on disconnect */ }

  someMethod() {
    this.emit('activate', { detail: this.count.value }); // bubbles + composed
  }
}
customElements.define('my-counter', MyCounter);
```

Usage: `<my-counter label="Clicks"></my-counter>`

Prop types: `String`, `Number`, `Boolean`
`this.prop('name')` returns a `Signal<T>` — interpolate directly in templates.

---

## PWA (src/pwa/pwa.ts)

```ts
import { pwa } from 'tina4js';

pwa.register('/sw.js');           // register service worker
pwa.manifest({ name: 'My App', short_name: 'App', theme_color: '#000' });
```

---

## Debug Overlay (src/debug/index.ts)

```ts
import { initDebug } from 'tina4js/debug';

initDebug(); // shows floating overlay with signals, components, routes, API panels
```

Only import in development. Tree-shaken in production if not imported.

---

## Common Patterns

### Shared global state
```ts
// store.ts
export const user = signal(null);
export const cart = signal([]);
// import in any component or route handler
```

### Uncontrolled inputs (avoid focus loss)
```ts
// DON'T bind input value to a signal on every keystroke — reactive re-render kills focus
// DO: read value at submit time
render() {
  return html`
    <input id="name" type="text" />
    <button @click=${() => {
      const val = (document.getElementById('name') as HTMLInputElement).value;
      this.submit(val);
    }}>Submit</button>
  `;
}
```

### 401 auto-redirect
```ts
api.intercept('response', (res) => {
  if (res.status === 401) navigate('/login', { replace: true });
});
```

### Guard with async check
```ts
route('/dashboard', {
  guard: () => !!localStorage.getItem('tina4_token') || '/login',
  handler: () => html`<dashboard-view></dashboard-view>`,
});
```

---

## Known Gotchas

1. **`.innerHTML` is a property binding, not content interpolation.**
   `${svgString}` → escaped text. `<div .innerHTML=${svgString}></div>` → raw HTML.

2. **`route(pattern, handler)` — pattern is ALWAYS first.**
   Wrong: `route(handler, '/path')`. Right: `route('/path', handler)`.

3. **`api.get(path, options)` — options is `{ params, headers }`, NOT path params.**
   Wrong: `api.get('/users/{id}', { id: 42 })`. Right: `api.get('/users', { params: { id: 42 } })`.

4. **Reactive re-render destroys input focus.**
   Use uncontrolled inputs; read values at submit time.

5. **`effect()` runs immediately.** It is not lazy. Call `dispose()` to stop it.

6. **`computed()` is read-only.** Writing throws an error.

7. **Non-2xx responses are thrown**, not returned. Always wrap `api.*` calls in try/catch.
